optionsmenu_gamepad_invertyorbit_desc: Invert the Y axis in Orbit-style cameras.
optionsmenu_gamepad_leftsticksensitivity: Use the slider to adjust how sensitive the Left Stick will be to movement.
optionsmenu_gamepad_noclip_desc: Turn on No Clip to pass through solid objects when navigating around your park.
optionsmenu_gamepad_rightsticksensitivit: Use the slider to adjust how sensitive the Right Stick will be to movement.
optionsmenu_gamepad_zoomsensitivity_desc: Use the slider to adjust how fast the camera will zoom in or out.
optionsmenu_geometric_desc: Choose the quality of geometrical details on the world and objects.
optionsmenu_globalframeratelockhint: Enable to lock the framerate at 30fps
optionsmenu_globalremovetracklimits_desc: Choose whether to remove the limits on banking and sloping angles for most coasters.
optionsmenu_globalsecurityfeatureshint: Enable Security Features. Some Scenarios require security and will override this setting.
optionsmenu_guestlitter_desc: Choose whether guests can drop litter.
optionsmenu_guestvomit_desc: Choose whether guests vomit if nauseous.
optionsmenu_hdr_brightness_details: Adjust the HDR brightness until the Logo is no longer visible.
optionsmenu_helpdetails: View tips and tricks on how to play.
optionsmenu_interfaceautoscale_tooltip: Disable Interface Autoscale to choose how much the Interface is scaled by yourself.
optionsmenu_interfacescale_tooltip: Scaling above 100% only recommended for use with high resolution displays (1440p / 4K). May cause UI display issues at lower resolutions.
optionsmenu_lensflare_desc: Choose how much lens flare you will see. Lens flares simulate the effect of lights refracting inside camera lens.
optionsmenu_loadprompt_confirmlabel:
Load save '{Name}'?
Unsaved changes to your current park will be lost.
optionsmenu_localparksettingsnotinpark: Setting only applies within a park
optionsmenu_localparkstaffenergyfeatures:
Enable Staff Management Features. Some Scenarios require them and will override this setting.
Changing this setting will not only enable/disable the staff energy system but will also change the values of hiring staff and their wage requirements.
optionsmenu_lpv_desc: Turn global illumination on or off. Global illumination is an effect that allows light to bounce off objects.
optionsmenu_missingdlctosavetooltip:
DLC REQUIRED
You are missing the following DLC required to save this park:
optionsmenu_mouseandkeyboard_custommouse: Adjust the Mouse and Keyboard controls to suit you.
optionsmenu_mouseandkeyboard_desc: Adjust your Mouse and Keyboard settings.
optionsmenu_mouseandkeyboard_keysensitiv: Use the slider to adjust how sensitive the camera will be to keyboard inputs.
optionsmenu_mouseandkeyboard_mousesensit: Use the slider to adjust how sensitive the camera will be to mouse movement.
optionsmenu_multisample_desc: Anti-aliasing produces a smoother overall image and reduces flickering on the edges of objects.
optionsmenu_refreshrate_desc: Choose the maximum frames per second.
optionsmenu_resolution_desc: Choose how many pixels to display.
optionsmenu_ridebreakdowns_desc: Enable Ride Breakdowns. Rides will require maintenance, or will break down.
optionsmenu_safeframe_adjustmentlocation: Adjust the area in which HUD elements will appear.
optionsmenu_safeframe_details: Adjust the slider until the markers are flush with the edges of your screen.
optionsmenu_savemenu_spawnpointwarning: <font color='#FF0000'>Warning: No guest spawn points present</font>
optionsmenu_scaleinfo_description: UI scaling will only be present during gameplay and not in the main menu.
optionsmenu_screenmode_desc: Choose which kind of window you will use.
optionsmenu_sdr_details: To adjust the brightness of your screen, move the slider so that the right most logo appears white.
optionsmenu_search_desc: Use this search tool to find a specific setting fast.
optionsmenu_settingsdetails: Adjust settings related to audio, display, and the game's interface.
optionsmenu_shadows_desc: Choose the level of detail and draw distance of the shadows.
optionsmenu_showadditionalprompts_desc: Show additional button prompts when using mouse and keyboard to assist with menu navigation.
optionsmenu_ssr_desc: Screen space reflections increase the realism of reflective surfaces.
optionsmenu_staffhappiness_desc: Choose whether to enable Staff Morale.
optionsmenu_texture_desc: Choose a level of detail for the textures.
optionsmenu_toiletcleanliness_desc: Enable Toilet Cleanliness. Hotels and Restaurants will require periodic cleaning after use.
optionsmenu_uploadchanges_changenotesdes: Inform other members of the changes you have made to this park.
optionsmenu_visual_heatmapcontrast_desc: Change the colours of the heatmap gradients on coasters and track rides to increase contrast. This affects the on-track colours, as well as the live Data panel and the Heatmaps panel.
optionsmenu_visual_interfacecolour_desc: Choose the main colour of the game's Interface.
optionsmenu_visual_interfacecolour_toolt: Change the colour of the Interface to {Colour}
optionsmenu_visual_onscreencontrols_desc: Choose whether to show controls on the screen as you play.
optionsmenu_visual_showparkboundary_desc: Choose whether to show the park boundary.
optionsmenu_volumeatmos_desc: Choose how detailed the foreground will be.
optionsmenu_water_desc: Choose the quality of the water rendering.
optionsmenu_workshopdetails: Download creations from other creators, or upload your own.
